versions.version_description: Simple chord progression, Morgan plays the song acoustically like this. You can play this song in half step down, or you can also use the same chords in standard and sounds fine. Morgan acoustic performance of these chords. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AKEBXI3blzE.

tuning: Eb Ab Db Gb Bb Eb
content:
Built from Morgan Wallen's live video.
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AKEBXI3blzE

Eb Ab Db Gb Db Eb - Easiest to play basic chords tuned down a half step -> G Am Em C
If you want to play standard tuning –> barre chords are F# G#m D#m B


[Intro]
[ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Girl, our mama's are best friends and so are we[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]
The whole town's rooting for us like the home team[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                                            [ch]C[/ch]
Most likely to settle down, plant a few roots real deep and let 'em grow[/tab]

[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]
But we can't stop this real world from spinning us[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]
Your bright lights called, I don't blame you for picking up[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]                                              [ch]C[/ch]
Your big dream bags are all packed up and ready to go[/tab]

But I just need you to know


[Chorus]
[tab]                 [ch]G[/ch]
That I love you more than a California sunset[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Am[/ch]
More than a beer when you ain't 21 yet[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Em[/ch]                                             [ch]C[/ch]
More than a Sunday morning Lord turnin' some poor lost souls 'round, Hallelujah bound[/tab]

[tab]                  [ch]G[/ch]
Yeah, I love you more than a feeling when a bass hits the hook[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Am[/ch]
When the guy gets the girl at the end of the book[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Em[/ch]                                           [ch]C[/ch]
But baby, this might be the last time I get to lay you down[/tab]
[tab]                                           [ch]G[/ch]
'Cause I can't love you more than my hometown[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]
Yeah, I ain't the runaway kind, I can't change that[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
My heart's stuck in these streets like the train tracks[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
City sky ain't the same black[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C[/ch]
Ain't that a map dot shame, man, to think that[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]
I love you more than a California sunset[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Am[/ch]
More than a beer when you ain't 21 yet[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Em[/ch]                                             [ch]C[/ch]
More than a Sunday morning Lord turning some poor lost souls 'round, Hallelujah bound[/tab]

[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]
I love you more than a feeling when a bass hits the hook[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Am[/ch]
When the guy gets the girl at the end of the book[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Em[/ch]                                          [ch]C[/ch]
But baby, this might be the last time I get to lay you down[/tab]
[tab]                                           [ch]G[/ch]
'Cause I can't love you more than my hometown[/tab]


[Verse 3]
[tab]                 [ch]G[/ch]
Yeah, you got a wild in your eyes that I just wasn't born with[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]
I'm a same gas station cup of coffee in the mornin'[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Em[/ch]                                                      [ch]C[/ch]
I need a house on the hill, girl, not in 'em, so hang onto these words[/tab]

till them avenues help you forget 'em


[Chorus]
[tab]                   [ch]G[/ch]
'Cause I love you more than a California sunset[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Am[/ch]
I love you more in a twenty dollar sun dress[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Em[/ch]
Hate that loaded down car you got your keys in, girl[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]
But I hate even more that you're leaving[/tab]

[tab]                   [ch]G[/ch]
'Cause I love you more than a feeling when a bass hits the hook[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Am[/ch]
When the guy gets the girl at the end of the book[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Em[/ch]                                        [ch]C[/ch]
But that ain't you and me so I guess I'll see you around[/tab]
[tab]                                          [ch]G[/ch]
'Cause I can't love you more than my hometown[/tab]

[tab]                           [ch]Am[/ch]
Love you more than my hometown[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]Em[/ch]
Love you more than my hometown[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]C[/ch]
Love you more, baby, love you more[/tab]

[ch]G[/ch]
